data.title: Roche reports positive phase III results for Gazyva/Gazyvaro in primary membranous nephropathy, achieving statistically significant complete remission at 2 years; no new safety concerns emerged.
data.description: In Basel on February 16, 2026, Roche revealed that in the phase III MAJESTY study involving adults with primary membranous nephropathy, the primary endpoint was successfully met by Gazyva®/Gazyvaro® (obinutuzumab). The results displayed statistically significant and clinically meaningful outcomes, indicating that a higher number of individuals achieved complete remission at two years (104 weeks) with Gazyva/Gazyvaro as compared to tacrolimus. The safety profile of Gazyva/Gazyvaro remained consistent with its established characteristics, with no new safety concerns identified during the study. The stocks associated with Roche are listed as SIX: RO and ROG on the Swiss Stock Exchange, as well as OTCQX: RHHBY.

data.title: Infortar acquired its own shares on Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange from 9-13 February 2026.
data.description: During the period of February 9 to 13, 2026, Aktsiaselts Infortar purchased its own shares on the Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange.

data.title: Study by Beyfortus in The Lancet Infectious Diseases reveals benefits for infants post-first RSV season.
data.description: A recent research study by Beyfortus, as reported in The Lancet Infectious Diseases, indicates positive outcomes for infants extending beyond their initial respiratory syncytial virus (RSV) season. The study highlights significant advantages for infants in subsequent RSV seasons.

data.title: QuidelOrtho partners with Lifotronic Technology Co., Ltd. to expand immunoassay portfolio globally, adding analyzer platforms and assay menu.
data.description: In a recent announcement on February 16, 2026, QuidelOrtho disclosed a strategic partnership with Lifotronic Technology Co., Ltd. The agreement involves the introduction of advanced analyzer platforms and an extension of the assay menu across crucial global markets. Lifotronic Technology Co., Ltd. (stock code: 688389) will be a key player in this long-term supply deal. The collaboration outlines the incorporation of new technologies and an expansion of testing capabilities to further enhance their service offerings worldwide.

data.title: Cognizant partners with Google Cloud to deploy AI solutions at scale for enterprises. Stock info: CTSH (NASDAQ).
data.description: Cognizant, based in Teaneck, New Jersey, has introduced a new phase in its services on February 16, 2026. Leveraging its AI builder methodology and specialized tools on Google Cloud, the company is empowering businesses to implement AI strategies into operational, regulated platforms effectively at a large scale. Cognizant is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol CTSH.

data.title: OpenAI brings in OpenClaw founder to spearhead development of personal AI agents, turning it into a foundation.
data.description: The founder announced plans to transform OpenClaw into a foundation, highlighting OpenAI as the most efficient method for making open agents accessible to all.

data.title: Survey by ResumeBuilder.com finds 60% of workers are hesitant to leave jobs in 2026 due to job market fears.
data.description: Concerns about the job market are leading to a notable increase in risk-averse behavior in Guaynabo, Puerto Rico. Recently, ResumeBuilder.com, a leading platform for professional resume templates and career guidance, released a survey report indicating a clear rise in "job hugging." This behavior entails individuals clinging to their current employment due to uncertainties in the job market. The report, released on Feb. 16, 2026, highlights a significant shift in attitudes, with individuals prioritizing job security over potential career advancement opportunities. This trend reflects a growing sense of apprehension surrounding the stability of the job market in the region.
